title: verbascum samniticum
intro: Verbascum samniticum, also known as the Italian mullein or large mullein, is a biennial plant in the figwort family that is native to the Mediterranean region. Its leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Verbascum samniticum include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health.
